Dear Sirs 
 
Sub: Audio recording - Earnings Call  
 
We refer to our letter dated 30th September, 2022, informing you about earnings call to be held 
on 19th October, 2022, relating to the Q2FY23 financial results.  
 
In terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirement), 
Regulations 2015, we write to inform you that the audio recording of the earnings call held on 
19th October, 2022 is available at: 
 
https://www.ultratechcement.com/investors/financials  
   
The same is for your information and record please. 
 
Yours very truly, 
 
For UltraTech Cement Limited 
 
 
 
Sanjeeb Kumar Chatterjee 
Company Secretary
